productDisplayName: Mr.Men Boys Oh Dear Blue T-shirt
description: Style NoteStretchy and comfy room-to-grow style t-shirt from Mr men, this stylish tee is the go-to piece for summertime games and fun, this tee will last longer than his scruffy escapades!Product DetailsBlue t-shirt with a round split neckline and a patch stitched inside, a short chest placket with buttons, short sleeves with a stitched on mock cuff and snipped edges, rubber print on the front and a stitched on mock hem with snipped edgesMaterial and Care100% CottonMachine wash warm with like colours using a mild detergentUse a non chlorine bleach if neededTumble dry lowCool iron; do not iron on decorationsDo not dry clean
